creator: erwan@rail.eu.org
text:
Joseph S. Atkinson wrote:
> Update your ports tree.
> 
> There was a commit yesterday that addresses the USE_QT macro.
> 
> It also removed the dead options for ESOUND and ARTS. I will add FAAC to
> my my list of options to investigate. The configuration errors are
> otherwise harmless other than forcing superfluous depends. You can
> deselect the option to avoid this.
> 
> Reply back if yesterday's commit corrected the Qt issue.
> 

Yes it did, thank you.

-- 
Erwan
